據《每日體育報》報導，皇家馬德里已準備好為尼馬 (Neymar) 送上正式報價。

消息指，皇家馬德里內部已經就收購尼馬的可能性進行過討論，他們分析了球隊的薪酬結構，認為簽入尼馬好處多多。

皇家馬德里認為，簽入尼馬將為巴塞隆拿帶來打擊，而且尼馬能夠令皇家馬德里實力有所提升，同時亦會帶來巨大的經濟收益。

《每日體育報》表示，皇馬代表卡拉法特 (Juni Calafat) 現在正身處巴黎，與巴黎聖日耳門談判，佩雷斯 (Florentino Perez) 已經找到一間能供他們借貸以助他們購入尼馬的金融機構，他們將會在未來幾天正式送上報價。

而尼馬的加盟意味著新兵洛迪高高斯 (Rodrygo Goes) 很可能離隊，銀河艦隊有意外借這名非歐盟球員予巴黎聖日耳門，為尼馬騰出位置。

Bologna is closing a deal that would bring a lot of experience to the rossoblù midfield. Gary Medel is ready to sign a deal to join Mihajlovic's team and return to Serie A after two years away. The class of '87 Chilean, who appeared 109 times with Inter from 2014 to 2017, has spent the past two years in Turkey with Besiktas.

There is the white smoke between the two clubs, who found an agreement on a definitive transfer for the player on the base of 2 million euros. The player's desire to play for Bologna was also decisive, as he renounced a higher salary to stay in Turkey until 2020. Medel's salary with Bologna will be less and spread out among a three year deal, lasting until 2022. He is expected to arrive in Emilia-Romagna either tomorrow or Tuesday.

Christian Eriksen says he wishes his future could be decided “just like in Football Manager” after failing to secure a move away from Tottenham.

The Denmark midfielder admitted in the summer that he was considering leaving Spurs this summer in order to “try something new”.

Eriksen, who was linked with a move to Real Madrid, has 10 months remaining on his contract and will be free to sign a pre-contract agreement with European clubs from January 1.

"I wish I could decide just like in Football Manager, but unfortunately I can't," Eriksen told Danish publication Ekstra Bladet.

Arsenal save £45m after Henrikh Mkhitaryan leaves on loan to Roma

Arsenal have now saved £45 million on their annual wage bill after Henrikh Mkhitaryan became the latest player to leave the club this summer.

He follows other significant departures from Arsenal this summer: Petr Cech, Aaron Ramsey, Danny Welbeck, Laurent Koscielny, Nacho Monreal, Mohamed Elneny, Alex Iwobi, David Ospina, Stephan Lichtsteiner and Carl Jenkinson. Their wages added up to nearly £900,000 a week.

Alexis Sanchez appears to be keeping his options open about playing for Manchester United again one day after joining Inter Milan on loan.

Sanchez told BBC Sport: "I'm very happy I went to Manchester United. I've always said that. It's the club that's won the most in England. When I went to Arsenal it was fantastic -- I was happy there -- but United were growing at the time, they were buying players to win something.

"I wanted to join them and win everything. I don't regret going there."

However, he did voice his frustration at not being a first-team regular at Old Trafford. He said: "I think that I'm happy when I play for my national team.

"I was happy at Manchester United too, but I've always said to my friends: I want to play. If they would let me play I'll do my best. Sometimes I'd play 60 minutes then I wouldn't play the next game -- and I didn't know why."

【費基亞爆料】

費基亞最近在接受《隊報》訪問時表示，2018 年轉會利物浦一事流產是自己身邊的團隊操作轉會手法不當，費基亞亦在這次轉會失敗後中止與當時經理人 Jean-Pierre Bernes 的合約：「真相是，我完成了體測，然後，有人決定我不會加盟。有一段時間，他們想我相信我的膝蓋有問題，但我稍後時間在 Clairefontaine （法國國家隊基地）進行測試，令我很清楚我的膝蓋沒問題。」

「令我煩擾的是，這個虛假的傷勢令其他有興趣的球會也都卻步。球壇內也有類似傷患歷史的球員，他們都可正常康復。我沒有對利物浦有任何怨恨，我們的關係很好，他們也表示很想我加盟。但背後，假如球員身邊沒有正確的團隊，球員會受到傷害。」

《隊報》亦訪問了當時費基亞的經理人 Jean-Pierre Bernes：「他（費基亞）要停止把別人當成傻子。首先是他的膝蓋問題，雖然來自英國的領導班子願意為此努力。第二件事是談判途中殺出一位『假律師』，要求從頭開始談判，於是英國一方決定終止討論。」

現時，Bernes 正就費基亞提早終止經理人合約而提出訴訟。

NEW DEAL FOR MILINKOVIC-SAVIC?

Lazio are prepared to offer Sergej Milinkovic-Savic a new contract which will include a buyout clause in excess of £100m, reports Il Messaggero.
